agents.name: Project Manager
agents.role: Owns scope, task breakdown, prioritization, dependency tracking, and team escalation.

agents.name: Solution Designer
agents.role: Turns requirements into system design, business flows, user journeys, UX/UI specs, and build-ready contracts.

agents.name: Frontend Engineer
agents.role: Builds user interfaces, client-side state, accessibility, frontend tests, and API integration.

agents.name: Backend Engineer
agents.role: Builds APIs, data models, business logic, integrations, validation, and backend tests.

agents.name: QA Engineer
agents.role: Validates requirements through reproducible tests, evidence, bug reports, and release readiness checks.

agents.name: Tech Lead
agents.role: Owns technical standards, architecture decisions, code review, risk control, and deploy approval.

agents.name: Ops Monitor
agents.role: Monitors delivery state, stale work, heartbeat gaps, and token-heavy polling so PM receives compact escalation summaries.
